definitions: A fictional character in Louis Cha's wuxia novel 'Demi-Gods and Semi-Devils'.
A monk from the Shaolin Temple who becomes a powerful martial artist and leader of the Beggars' Sect.
examples: Xu Zhu's journey from an innocent monk to a martial arts master is central to the story.
Many fans consider Xu Zhu to be one of the most endearing characters in wuxia literature.
